message:
Implement jfp serve MCP server mode

Add MCP server functionality for agent-native access to JeffreysPrompts:

- Resources: prompt://<id> returns prompt content
- Tools: search_prompts (query, category, tags, limit)
- Tools: render_prompt (id, variables, context)
- Add --config flag to show Claude Desktop config snippet
- Add @modelcontextprotocol/sdk dependency

Closes bead 2sw

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
